chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1323 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case For hearing of main case 08-05-2025 Mr. Deedar Ali M. Chohan, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G. **** Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition for the reason that the purpose, for which instant petition was filed, has been achieved. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed of as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
